title: Eye Stoard
rule: Secure, safely expanding storage for Final_Eye witness — field compiler receipts, Grok16 posture, sealed blobs. Append-only ledger. Cap grows only on verified demand, never unbounded.

zones.compile: Compile smoke receipts and bench rows
zones.quarantine: Rejected writes — cap exceeded, seal fail, oversize blob

security.egress: localhost API only — no remote mount
